message:
test(doom/wad): add 20 tests for WAD parsing, lump extraction, and format validation (bd-niekr)

Cover: parse_linedefs/sidedefs/sectors/segs/subsectors/nodes/things (single record),
parse_playpal (valid, too small, missing lump), parse_colormap (valid, too small),
duplicate lump names use first index, empty lump data for vertices/linedefs/things,
exact minimum size (12 bytes), 11 bytes too small, multiple vertices, find_lump_after
from start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
